# mlr3viz

Package website: [release](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/) \|
[dev](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/dev/)

*mlr3viz* is the visualization package of the
[mlr3](https://mlr-org.com/) ecosystem. It features plots for mlr3
objects such as tasks, learners, predictions, benchmark results, tuning
instances and filters via the
[`autoplot()`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/autoplot.html)
generic of [ggplot2](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/). The package draws
plots with the [viridis](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=viridisLite)
color palette and applies the [minimal
theme](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/ggtheme.html).
Visualizations include barplots, boxplots, histograms, ROC curves, and
Precision-Recall curves.

The [gallery](https://mlr-org.com/gallery/technical/2022-12-22-mlr3viz/)
features a **showcase post** of the plots in `mlr3viz`.

## Installation

Install the last release from CRAN:

``` r
install.packages("mlr3viz")
```

Install the development version from GitHub:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("mlr-org/mlr3viz")
```

## Resources

The [gallery](https://mlr-org.com/gallery/technical/2022-12-22-mlr3viz/)
features a showcase post of the visualization functions `mlr3viz`.

## Short Demo

``` r
library(mlr3)
library(mlr3viz)

task = tsk("pima")
learner = lrn("classif.rpart", predict_type = "prob")
rr = resample(task, learner, rsmp("cv", folds = 3), store_models = TRUE)

# Default plot for task
autoplot(task, type = "target")
```

![](reference/figures/README-demo-1.png)

``` r
# ROC curve for resample result
autoplot(rr, type = "roc")
```

![](reference/figures/README-demo-2.png)

For more example plots you can have a look at the [pkgdown
references](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/index.html) of the
respective functions.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`as_precrec()`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/as_precrec.md)
  : Convert to 'precrec' Format
- [`autoplot(`*`<BenchmarkResult>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.BenchmarkResult.md)
  : Plots for Benchmark Results
- [`autoplot(`*`<EnsembleFSResult>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.EnsembleFSResult.md)
  : Plots for Ensemble Feature Selection Results
- [`autoplot(`*`<Filter>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.Filter.md)
  : Plots for Filter Scores
- [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerClassif>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClassif.md)
  : Plot for Classification Learners
- [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerClassifCVGlmnet>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClassifGlmnet.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerClassifGlmnet>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClassifGlmnet.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerRegrCVGlmnet>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClassifGlmnet.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerRegrGlmnet>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClassifGlmnet.md)
  : Plots for GLMNet Learners
- [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerClassifRpart>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClassifRpart.md)
  [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerRegrRpart>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClassifRpart.md)
  : Plots for Rpart Learners
- [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerClustHierarchical>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerClustHierarchical.md)
  : Plots for Hierarchical Clustering Learners
- [`autoplot(`*`<LearnerRegr>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.LearnerRegr.md)
  : Plot for Regression Learners
- [`autoplot(`*`<OptimInstanceBatchSingleCrit>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.OptimInstanceBatchSingleCrit.md)
  : Plots for Optimization Instances
- [`autoplot(`*`<PredictionClassif>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.PredictionClassif.md)
  : Plots for Classification Predictions
- [`autoplot(`*`<PredictionClust>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.PredictionClust.md)
  : Plots for Cluster Predictions
- [`autoplot(`*`<PredictionRegr>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.PredictionRegr.md)
  : Plots for Regression Predictions
- [`autoplot(`*`<ResampleResult>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.ResampleResult.md)
  : Plots for Resample Results
- [`autoplot(`*`<TaskClassif>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.TaskClassif.md)
  : Plots for Classification Tasks
- [`autoplot(`*`<TaskClust>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.TaskClust.md)
  : Plots for Clustering Tasks
- [`autoplot(`*`<TaskRegr>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.TaskRegr.md)
  : Plots for Regression Tasks
- [`autoplot(`*`<TuningInstanceBatchSingleCrit>`*`)`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/autoplot.TuningInstanceBatchSingleCrit.md)
  : Plots for Tuning Instances
- [`mlr3viz`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/mlr3viz-package.md)
  [`mlr3viz-package`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/mlr3viz-package.md)
  : mlr3viz: Visualizations for 'mlr3'
- [`plot_learner_prediction()`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/plot_learner_prediction.md)
  : Plots for Learner Predictions
- [`predict_grid()`](https://mlr3viz.mlr-org.com/reference/predict_grid.md)
  : Generates a data.table of evenly distributed points.
